## Design / UX constraints

## Git / deploy expectations

- **You (Developer) own the feature branch name** — create `feat/…` / `fix/…` / `chore/…` from `main` (PM suggestion optional below).
- Suggested branch name (optional): 
- Open a PR; wait for Vercel Preview; then fill `docs/templates/handoff-qa.md` with the **exact Preview URL** (do not invent it).
- Default path: feature branch → QA Pass 1 on Preview → merge when CEO asks → QA Pass 2 on https://ccvaa-web.vercel.app/  
  See `docs/protocols/GIT_DEPLOY.md`.

## Done means

Lint/typecheck clean; PR open; **exact Preview URL** recorded in QA Pass 1 handoff.
